choices: Charmy has all of them drink some and they become bee girls
Charmy has all of them drink some becoming loyal bees to Charmy
Charmy has Julie-Su drink some causing her to become a loyal bee to Charmy
Option one but they are all male bees to Charmy’s surprise
1.content:
Charmy awoke in his old Chaotix bedroom thinking to himself how things had changed as he grew older with Eggman no longer being a threat at his age the heroes managed to find things to do in their lives besides saving the world constantly with Charmy managing to have a somewhat normal life with Saffron with the exceptions of occasionally Master Emerald watching and being a survivor of his kingdom along with Saffron after it was wiped out by the mad doctor years ago. It hurt back then as it still did now knowing he lost his entire family and almost race with him feeling that he had to live with possibly seeing it wiped out in his lifetime...that was until recently.

Being adults meant that Saffron and Charmy started having sex regularly with the female bee explaining to the male that the men of their species came special honey instead of sperm that could not only produce offspring like regular sperm can in the process of breeding but it will make women of the species primordial for twenty four hours after drinking some as they only have sex and obeying the male whom the honey came from in mind during it all. What they didn’t know however was that due to constant exposure to many things over their adventures especially Chaos Energy in vast amounts at multiple times the properties of the honey were changed a bit as even after twenty four hours Saffron still seemed to obey Charmy without question and despite the duo always having sex in their room the honey had a strong aroma to it that entered the rooms of every Chaotix member and started to effect them in different ways but the most common was that they seemed all willing to do whatever Charmy said no matter how ridiculous or difficult which made the bee curious on what would happen if they were to consume some...
1.title: Introduction

choices: Charmy decides to see how else he can change them
Charmy continues his fun with the team
Charmy decides to test his new abilities on others
The phone starts ringing as the Chaotix have a new job
11.content:
The bee had decided to test it on all of his teammates as he filled multiple cups full of honey and asked everyone to come in and drink a cup full which thanks to the aroma they didn’t question why as each happily did so. “That honey...tasted great.” Knuckles was the first to speak up as Mighty spoke up next, “I want more...” Charmy felt to oblige the request as he pointed to his penis, “Suck if you want it.” The victims licked their lips as Ray was first to move jumping out of his chair and nearly knocking Charmy to the ground as he wrapped his arms around his waist to suck off his master with his features changing more and more as he consumed the honey as breasts were forming along with his penis shrinking to nothing.
“That’s enough Ray!” The squirrel jumped off as ordered as Charmy looked at his work and smiled, “You can have more later let the others have their turns.” That made the others quite excited as one by one they each performed the job changing into women like Ray and noticed their bodies becoming more bee like after they sat away long enough with each now having wings and stingers...
11.title: Charmy has all of them drink some and they beco...

113.content:
Charmy deciding that limiting it to just his teammates was no fun and wanted to share it with others.

"Girls do you know were Sonic or Tails is?"

"Tails should be in his lab master,"answered Ray."Sonic will be hard to get pinned down he could be anywere."

"Hm..alright,"said Charmy smiling."Let's see..I think I should go after..
113.title: Charmy decides to test his new abilities on others

1135.content:
Charmy thought of more targets and what could happen if he managed to recruit them and four cams to mind:
1. Eggman- in the doctor’s current state he wouldn’t put up much resistance and thanks to the honey’s transformative properties he could be changed into something useful and give the bee an army of robot soldiers to work with.
2. Elias Acorn- in recent years he managed to take the throne back from Naugus so putting him under his sway could mean control over the Acorn Kingdom.
3. Zonic the Zone Cop- he had vast knowledge and skills that could be to the bee’s advantage on par with Sonic but with much more knowledge of other dimensions Charmy could use the only issue was to figure out how to get to him.
4. Blaze the Cat- the feline was very powerful on her own but with her under his control the Sol Zone would likely fall not long after, usually she would be difficult to reach as she calls that place home but she was temporarily visiting Mobius while renting an apartment in Station Square meaning she was alone at the time being...
1135.title: Someone else

11354.content:
"Let's go after Blaze,"said Charmy.

"What about Tails or Sonic?"asked Ray.

"We can get them later,"answered Charmy smiling."Let's go then."

They soon went to go see Blaze. Who just happened to be visiting the others on Mobius and was easy to get to.
11354.title: Target Blaze

choices: Follow Charmy as he gets Blaze’s attention
Follow Saffron as she gets Marine’s attention
Charmy is spotted by Silver and Gold and has to come up with an excuse
Charmy decides to wait longer for an opening to be made
Follow the Chaotix as they start to find ways to help Charmy from home
113543.content: Knowing the changes the others had gone through the only one Charmy could bring with him was Saffron as he went to Station Square and made his way to the apartment Blaze said she was renting out in a message she sent to all of her friends so they could visit her during her trip if they could and peaked through a window to realize she had brought the eccentric raccoon Marine with her as both were watching the newest hit drama with a bowl of popcorn between them. “Since neither have been affected by my aroma like the team was well before hand getting either to drink my honey will be difficult and I need to recruit them separately...” Charmy had to think hard on how he was going to get to Blaze as he ordered Saffron to prepare a way to get Marine away from her.
113543.title: Blaze brought Marine as well.

info.brief_description: As Charmy becomes an adult he decides to restart his colony with friend and foe alike
info.description:
Charmy has become an adult and decides restoring his bee kingdom (see Pre Wave Archie) is of the highest priority and that the honey his body produces can help him do that by making others into bees who serve him.

Rules:
No fattening, foot, armpit, giantness, shrinking, or diaper fetishes

This is a mind control and turn others into a thing story so if that isn’t for you then perhaps look elsewhere but keep that in mind when writing chapters

Charmy is the main character it is okay to go off and check other things but try to make it come back to him eventually

As the description says Charmy has become an adult in this story so sex is allowed for all of these characters

Charmy’s honey can change someone’s gender along with their species but only if he wants to change their gender

With all that in mind have fun adding chapters with me!
